누가복음 22:1.content: Now the feast of unleavened bread, which is called the Passover, was approaching.

누가복음 22:2.content: The chief priests and the scribes sought how they might put him to death, for they feared the people.

누가복음 22:3.content: Satan entered into Judas, who was also called Iscariot, who was counted with the twelve.

누가복음 22:4.content: He went away, and talked with the chief priests and captains about how he might deliver him to them.

누가복음 22:5.content: They were glad, and agreed to give him money.

누가복음 22:6.content: He consented, and sought an opportunity to deliver him to them in the absence of the multitude.

누가복음 22:7.content: The day of unleavened bread came, on which the Passover must be sacrificed.

누가복음 22:8.content: Jesus sent Peter and John, saying, “Go and prepare the Passover for us, that we may eat.”

누가복음 22:9.content: They said to him, “Where do you want us to prepare?”

누가복음 22:10.content: He said to them, “Behold, when you have entered into the city, a man carrying a pitcher of water will meet you. Follow him into the house which he enters.

누가복음 22:11.content: Tell the master of the house, ‘The Teacher says to you, “Where is the guest room, where I may eat the Passover with my disciples?” ’

누가복음 22:12.content: He will show you a large, furnished upper room. Make preparations there.”

누가복음 22:13.content: They went, found things as Jesus had told them, and they prepared the Passover.

누가복음 22:14.content: When the hour had come, he sat down with the twelve apostles.

누가복음 22:15.content: He said to them, “I have earnestly desired to eat this Passover with you before I suffer,

누가복음 22:16.content: for I tell you, I will no longer by any means eat of it until it is fulfilled in God’s Kingdom.”

누가복음 22:17.content: He received a cup, and when he had given thanks, he said, “Take this, and share it among yourselves,

누가복음 22:18.content: for I tell you, I will not drink at all again from the fruit of the vine, until God’s Kingdom comes.”

누가복음 22:19.content: He took bread, and when he had given thanks, he broke, and gave it to them, saying, “This is my body which is given for you. Do this in memory of me.”

누가복음 22:20.content: Likewise, he took the cup after supper, saying, “This cup is the new covenant in my blood, which is poured out for you.

누가복음 22:21.content: But behold, the hand of him who betrays me is with me on the table.

누가복음 22:22.content: The Son of Man indeed goes, as it has been determined, but woe to that man through whom he is betrayed!”

누가복음 22:23.content: They began to question among themselves, which of them it was who would do this thing.

누가복음 22:24.content: A dispute also arose among them, which of them was considered to be greatest.

누가복음 22:25.content: He said to them, “The kings of the nations lord it over them, and those who have authority over them are called ‘benefactors.’

누가복음 22:26.content: But not so with you. But one who is the greater among you, let him become as the younger, and one who is governing, as one who serves.

누가복음 22:27.content: For who is greater, one who sits at the table, or one who serves? Isn’t it he who sits at the table? But I am among you as one who serves.

누가복음 22:28.content: But you are those who have continued with me in my trials.

누가복음 22:29.content: I confer on you a kingdom, even as my Father conferred on me,

누가복음 22:30.content: that you may eat and drink at my table in my Kingdom. You will sit on thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.”

누가복음 22:31.content: The Lord said, “Simon, Simon, behold, Satan asked to have all of you, that he might sift you as wheat,

누가복음 22:32.content: but I prayed for you, that your faith wouldn’t fail. You, when once you have turned again, establish your brothers.”

누가복음 22:33.content: He said to him, “Lord, I am ready to go with you both to prison and to death!”

누가복음 22:34.content: He said, “I tell you, Peter, the rooster will by no means crow today until you deny that you know me three times.”

누가복음 22:35.content: He said to them, “When I sent you out without purse, wallet, and sandals, did you lack anything?” They said, “Nothing.”

누가복음 22:36.content: Then he said to them, “But now, whoever has a purse, let him take it, and likewise a wallet. Whoever has none, let him sell his cloak, and buy a sword.

누가복음 22:37.content: For I tell you that this which is written must still be fulfilled in me: ‘He was counted with transgressors.’ For that which concerns me has an end.”

누가복음 22:38.content: They said, “Lord, behold, here are two swords.” He said to them, “That is enough.”

누가복음 22:39.content: He came out and went, as his custom was, to the Mount of Olives. His disciples also followed him.

누가복음 22:40.content: When he was at the place, he said to them, “Pray that you don’t enter into temptation.”

누가복음 22:41.content: He was withdrawn from them about a stone’s throw, and he knelt down and prayed,

누가복음 22:42.content: saying, “Father, if you are willing, remove this cup from me. Nevertheless, not my will, but yours, be done.”

누가복음 22:43.content: An angel from heaven appeared to him, strengthening him.

누가복음 22:44.content: Being in agony he prayed more earnestly. His sweat became like great drops of blood falling down on the ground.

누가복음 22:45.content: When he rose up from his prayer, he came to the disciples, and found them sleeping because of grief,

누가복음 22:46.content: and said to them, “Why do you sleep? Rise and pray that you may not enter into temptation.”

누가복음 22:47.content: While he was still speaking, behold, a multitude, and he who was called Judas, one of the twelve, was leading them. He came near to Jesus to kiss him.

누가복음 22:48.content: But Jesus said to him, “Judas, do you betray the Son of Man with a kiss?”

누가복음 22:49.content: When those who were around him saw what was about to happen, they said to him, “Lord, shall we strike with the sword?”

누가복음 22:50.content: A certain one of them struck the servant of the high priest, and cut off his right ear.

누가복음 22:51.content: But Jesus answered, “Let me at least do this”—and he touched his ear, and healed him.

누가복음 22:52.content: Jesus said to the chief priests, captains of the temple, and elders, who had come against him, “Have you come out as against a robber, with swords and clubs?

누가복음 22:53.content: When I was with you in the temple daily, you didn’t stretch out your hands against me. But this is your hour, and the power of darkness.”

누가복음 22:54.content: They seized him, and led him away, and brought him into the high priest’s house. But Peter followed from a distance.

누가복음 22:55.content: When they had kindled a fire in the middle of the courtyard, and had sat down together, Peter sat among them.

누가복음 22:56.content: A certain servant girl saw him as he sat in the light, and looking intently at him, said, “This man also was with him.”

누가복음 22:57.content: He denied Jesus, saying, “Woman, I don’t know him.”

누가복음 22:58.content: After a little while someone else saw him, and said, “You also are one of them!” But Peter answered, “Man, I am not!”

누가복음 22:59.content: After about one hour passed, another confidently affirmed, saying, “Truly this man also was with him, for he is a Galilean!”

누가복음 22:60.content: But Peter said, “Man, I don’t know what you are talking about!” Immediately, while he was still speaking, a rooster crowed.

누가복음 22:61.content: The Lord turned and looked at Peter. Then Peter remembered the Lord’s word, how he said to him, “Before the rooster crows you will deny me three times.”

누가복음 22:62.content: He went out, and wept bitterly.

누가복음 22:63.content: The men who held Jesus mocked him and beat him.

누가복음 22:64.content: Having blindfolded him, they struck him on the face and asked him, “Prophesy! Who is the one who struck you?”

누가복음 22:65.content: They spoke many other things against him, insulting him.

누가복음 22:66.content: As soon as it was day, the assembly of the elders of the people were gathered together, both chief priests and scribes, and they led him away into their council, saying,

누가복음 22:67.content: “If you are the Christ, tell us.” But he said to them, “If I tell you, you won’t believe,

누가복음 22:68.content: and if I ask, you will in no way answer me or let me go.

누가복음 22:69.content: From now on, the Son of Man will be seated at the right hand of the power of God.”

누가복음 22:70.content: They all said, “Are you then the Son of God?” He said to them, “You say it, because I am.”

누가복음 22:71.content: They said, “Why do we need any more witness? For we ourselves have heard from his own mouth!”
